page.name: Planning your Synchronous Session (team)
page.content:
The first two weeks of Unit 4 will be used to plan, practise and rehearse for your synchronous session (Assignment 3) that takes place in week 8 or 9.  Build on your team's brainstorming and audience analysis completed in the last unit, to prepare your session. Use your team's synchronous space to rehearse.

Your instructors will be available to meet with your team during weeks 6 & 7.
